name: MUC_cluster_11p15
description: Mucin gene cluster on chromosome 11p15.5, containing MUC2, MUC5AC, MUC5B, MUC6. Each MUC gene contains large central VNTR exons of 60-87 bp tandem repeats coding for the mucin protein backbone. The VNTR exons range from 5 to >50 kb and are highly polymorphic between individuals.

architecture.internal_structure: MUC2, MUC5AC, MUC5B, MUC6 in tandem on 11p15.5; each gene contains large VNTR exon of 60-87 bp repeats coding for PTS-rich mucin backbone; VNTR length highly variable, polymorphic between alleles, frequent length variants in disease.
